title: Carpet PvP Practice
description: Carpet PvP is a mod with unique features for players to practice PvP efficiently.
body:
# Carpet PvP Practice

Carpet PvP Practice by [AndrewCTF](https://andrewctf.tech/) is a mod for users to practice PvP efficiently without the fear of losing to other players. Players can practice PvP anytime and anywhere, even without an internet connection!

Users can refer to the [documentation](https://github.com/AndrewCTF/Carpet-PvP/wiki) and software update changelogs to get the latest command documentation and usage. 


Discord: https://discord.gg/PAbydjFxKs
GitHub: https://github.com/AndrewCTF/Carpet-PvP/

## 🚀 Features
- All original Carpet PvP functionality
- Bot elytra gliding feature
- Bot armor auto-equipping system
- Extended player commands
- Scarpet scripting integration
- Comprehensive testing framework
- Comprehensive combat framework
- Comprehensive PvP practice commands
- Comprehensive documentation
- 1.8 combat features (Spam clicking and block hitting)
- Active community 
- Frequent contributers and updates

## ⌛ Update Schedule 
This is a hot topic discussed in both [Carpet PvP's GitHub](https://github.com/AndrewCTF/Carpet-PvP/) and [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/PAbydjFxKs). We aim to provide updates within 2 weeks of Fabric API's release (excluding beta releases).

## 💻 Hardware requirements
1. A decent CPU with 2 core or 4 threads.
2. 2 GB of ram

## 💾 Software requirements
- Minecraft 26.1.2
- Fabric API
- OpenJDK 25

## ❓ Issues
Users can create an issue report at our [GitHub issues page](https://github.com/AndrewCTF/Carpet-PvP/issues) or through our [Discord server issues channel](https://discord.gg/PAbydjFxKs).

Include your Minecraft version, Carpet PvP Practice version, logs and information on how to reproduce the issue.

# ❗ Disclaimers
Carpet PvP Practice is under the MIT license, users can freely modify, use and redistribute this software. Carpet PvP Practice is not affiliated with Theobaldthebird's carpet PvP mod or the original Carpet mod. We aim to create a unique experience for users to experience, from new exciting features to quality of life improvements. We will not provide support for old versions of Carpet PvP. If you have any enquiries, you can enquire me through [Discord](https://discord.gg/PAbydjFxKs) or email (email.xryong@gmail.com).
Carpet PvP Practice is a fork of Theobaldthebird's Carpet PvP which is a fork of Carpet mod.
